general_requirements.name: Breadth of Study
general_requirements.description: One course in each of six areas: Creative Expression, Social Institutions and Human Behavior, History/Values/Ethics, Physical and Biological Sciences, Mathematical Reasoning, and Letters

general_requirements.name: First-Year Seminar (ID1)
general_requirements.description: Intensive writing seminar taken in first year

general_requirements.name: Foreign Language
general_requirements.description: Proficiency through third semester or equivalent
